<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Fragment; /** * Implements the ESI rendering strategy. * * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> */ class EsiFragmentRenderer extends AbstractSurrogateFragmentRenderer { public function getName(): string { return 'esi'; } }
